title: Can't Stop, Won't Stop: A Bad Boy Story
original_title: Can't Stop, Won't Stop: A Bad Boy Story
overview: A behind-the-scenes look at the prolific label's legacy and offer an in-depth look at the two-night anniversary extravaganza that took place last May at Brooklyn's Barclays Center in honor of the late rap great, The Notorious B.I.G.
